message:
refactor: Remove unused WasmEdge files and embedded build target

Removed dead files:
- src/edgebox_embedded.zig - Old WasmEdge embedded runtime (not imported)
- src/wizer.zig - Old WasmEdge wizer (replaced by wizer_wamr.zig)
- build.zig embedded target that referenced non-existent libwasmedge-minimal.a

Kept active files (WAMR with wasmedge_process compatibility):
- src/edgebox_wamr.zig, src/edgeboxd_wamr.zig - WAMR runtimes
- src/edgebox_run.zig - Used by edgeboxd
- src/wizer_wamr.zig - WAMR wizer implementation
- src/wasi_process.zig - wasmedge_process API definitions
